Text: DMH Yoon arrived. Dad talked to Yong behind the door (for 25 secs)

Headline: - 1h 3m
Text: Dad, opened the door and walked in. Within 20 secs, left the room.

Headline: - 47m
Text: Lopez and partner arrived

Headline: - 22m
Text: Sgt Ruvalcaba joined. Check who are Primary and Non-lethal Weapon.

Headline: - 6s

Headline: Shots Fired !!! (11:58:03) (11:58:03) (11:58:04)
Text: Lopez shot Yong, three times (11:58:03) (11:58:03) (11:58:04)

Headline: 11s

Text: Sgt Ruvalcaba radioed "Officer Needs Help"

Headline: 1m 39s
Text: Ambulance moved away from the scene

Headline: 2m 47s
Text: Projectile Gun removed as Lopez left (less than 3 min)

Headline: 8m 20s

Headline: 12m 20s

Headline: 14m
Text: Death Announcement (Paramedic Peterman #386201) (Kelly Yagerlener Report)

Headline: 1h 3m
Text: Aaron Ponce apporached to Dad and said "Sorry for your Loss" (Time check Needed)

Headline: 2h
Text: LAPD Officer Carrasco 39957 reported Yong's death to Medical Examiner.

Headline: 2h 44m
Text: Mom & Dad went LAPD Olympic station along with Sergeant Violet Potter 35464 - Family Liaison

Headline: 6h 42m
